pi_items.source: Task description and metadata specify this as the name for the new RfQ Topic to be created during task execution. This is not a pre-existing entity but a new artifact to be created by the agent.

Cross-verified across multiple iDempiere tasks: 'Patio Chair' appears as product with m_product_id=133 in task 'update_export_pricelist_and_create_order@1'. Also confirmed in task description as part of GardenWorld 'patio line' products. The consecutive product IDs (Patio Chair=133, Patio Table=134, Patio Sun Screen=135) indicate these are standard GardenWorld seed products.

Quantity value '20' for Patio Chair is verified as consistent across multiple task specifications. In task 'update_export_pricelist_and_create_order@1', a sales order also specifies 'Patio Chair (quantity 20)', confirming this is a standard test value for this product.

Referenced as 'a pre-loaded GardenWorld vendor' in task 'create_purchase_order@1' description. Also appears in multiple other tasks (create_material_receipt, update_purchase_prices, create_bank_statement) treating it as an existing business partner in GardenWorld. No SQL creation scripts found, indicating it's part of standard GardenWorld seed data. However, official iDempiere documentation does not provide a public list of GardenWorld seed business partners to independently verify.

Referenced as 'a pre-loaded GardenWorld customer' in task 'create_sales_order@1' description. Also appears in multiple other tasks (create_customer_shipment, create_rma) treating it as an existing business partner. No SQL creation scripts found in environment setup. Cross-task consistency validation shows this entity is treated as canonical across multiple task definitions. However, official iDempiere documentation does not provide a public list of GardenWorld seed business partners to independently verify.

Task specification and verifier.py line 49 confirm that minimum 2 subscribers must be added to the RfQ. The task requires adding exactly 2 subscribers: 'Seed Farm Inc.' and 'C&W Construction'. The verifier awards full points when subscriber_count >= min_subscriber_count.

privileged_info_summary: The create_rfq task operates on iDempiere version 12 (official Docker image idempiereofficial/idempiere:12-release) with the GardenWorld sample database (client_id 11). The task creates a new Request for Quotation (RfQ) using verified pre-existing GardenWorld products: 'Patio Chair' (product_id 133, quantity 20) is a confirmed real product in the GardenWorld patio product line. The task attempts to add 'Seed Farm Inc.' and 'C&W Construction' as RfQ subscribers; both are described in related task definitions as pre-loaded GardenWorld business partners, though they cannot be independently verified through public documentation. All data is synthetic, generated by iDempiere's standard GardenWorld seed database initialization.
